message:
fix(node): harden token chain deserialization and extend nonce replay detection

Two security improvements to the audience token subsystem:

1. Custom Deserialize for TokenChain: Replace derived Deserialize with
   a hand-written impl that validates chain invariants on deserialization
   (non-empty chain, valid root, valid parent linkage via append()).
   Prevents construction of invalid chains from untrusted JSON.

2. Full-chain nonce replay detection: Extend replay check from leaf-only
   to all tokens in the delegation chain, and record all nonces (not
   just the leaf) on successful verification.  Prevents an attacker from
   replaying an intermediate delegation token whose nonce was never
   tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
